title.en: Countless stars shattered, and countless angels...

content.en:
this day.

In the territory of the Angel Clan of the Great Universe Clan, an aura of despair permeated.

"Not good!"

The supremes of the angel clan all changed their expressions drastically, and one by one they crossed the galaxy with their hands, bringing countless angel clansmen into the small universe in their bodies, and then flew away one by one.

The next moment, the void tore apart, and the billions of miles of territory instantly turned into a black hole, and then a terrifying shockwave swept across the surrounding territory.

Countless stars shattered, and countless angels turned to ashes.

There are many star fields of the Angel Clan, but now more than ninety percent of the Star Fields have been devastated, countless ordinary Angel Clans have fallen and died, and only some powerful Angel Clans have survived.

Of course.

The supremes of the angel clan also took away some important angel clan members in time, and they can slowly reproduce in the future, but the angel clan is no longer a cosmic clan.

"How can this be, why is the location of the cosmic impact our angel clan territory???"

The supremes of the angel clan all roared with sad expressions.

The shockwave of the cosmic impact was so fast that it not only almost destroyed the angels, but also spread towards the entire universe, or the entire universe trembled.

The trembling of the universe is no small thing, and if some small stars move a little, many mortals will die.

Terran.

At the moment of the cosmic impact, many divine arrays of the Terran were opened one after another, protecting the territory of the Terran, and the supremes of the Terran also exerted their monstrous power to protect the star field of the Terran one by one.

The cosmic shock lasted for several hours before slowly dissipating, and the Terrans were well prepared and far from the point of impact, so there was no loss.

A starry sky for the Terrans.

One by one, the Supreme Beings gathered, including the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Ye Tian.

"I just got the news that the impact point is on the Angel Clan, and the Angel Clan was almost wiped out!"

Mixed Yuan Supreme Dao.

"The Angel Clan is really a little unlucky!" Ye Tian sighed.

In the past, the strength of the Angel Race was much stronger than that of the Human Race, and it was the top clan in the universe!

But now, the angel clan has become like this, and I don't know if there is a chance to develop.

If the two universes collide together, all races will face a dilemma, and the countless civilizations of the two universes will inevitably collide, and even the Supreme may not be able to survive safely here.

Therefore, it is too difficult for the angel clan to rise again under such a predicament!

"Mixed Yuan Supreme, let's go to the impact point and take a look, the other Supreme Guardian Terrans!"

Ye Tian commanded.

As the first supreme of the human race, Ye Tian's words were naturally very authoritative, and the other supremes obeyed them one by one.

Wow!

Ye Tian and the Mixed Yuan Supreme left the territory of the human race and rushed to the impact point, which was still the place where the angel clan was before.

In half a day, Ye Tian and the Mixed Yuan Supreme arrived at their destination.

At this time, there have been many supreme beings gathered here.

Among them are the Protoss, the Demon Race, and those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, these Supremes are here to see the situation, after all, it is the first time they have encountered the collision of the two universes.

Before, there were still Supremes who might have doubted the authenticity of the Dual Universe Transcendence Method, but now that the Dual Universes have really collided, this time they really believe it.

"Wanfa Supreme, you are here too!"

The First Divine Lord of the Protoss flew to Ye Tian's side and greeted Ye Tian.

"First Divine Master!"

Ye Tian shouted softly, his tone was very flat.

And the Mixed Yuan Supreme greeted the First God Lord more politely, but the First God Lord was just a little perfunctory.

For the First Divine Master, if it weren't for Ye Tian's existence, it would be impossible for him to look at the Mixed Yuan Supreme at all.

At this time.

Many supreme beings are observing this impact point, this impact point is a black hole covering multiple star fields, this black hole is a passage, but now the two universes are in the run-in stage, and the rules are extremely chaotic.

At this time, even the Supreme did not dare to pass through the black hole, otherwise he would be strangled to death.

"Can't get in!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If he dared to go in, no matter how strong his physical body was, he would not be able to withstand the tearing power of this black hole, and he would not be able to last long at all.

"We have to wait 100,000 years!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

The initial fusion of the two universes would take a long time to transform, and no one would be able to pass through a black hole to another universe for 100,000 years.

Moreover, if the rules of the two universes are not integrated into the other universe, the creatures of the two universes will not dare to step into each other's universes, otherwise it will be equivalent to leaving the universe and dying instantly.

Therefore, even if this black hole is stabilized now, the Supremes present do not dare to enter it.

"Let's go back!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, Ye Tian and the Mixed Yuan Supreme returned to the human race.

And the other Supremes also left one by one!

Now there are only 100,000 years left for the ten thousand races, and 100,000 years is not a long time, and for the supremes, there is no improvement in strength at all.

Even for Ye Tian, a mere 100,000 years is nothing, it is too short, and if he wants to improve more time, it will take far more than 100,000 years.

Now, there is only one place that can make Ye Tian's strength skyrocket—the Misty Area!

Strictly speaking, it is the core area of the Fog region.

"My strength must have reached the combat power of the first-class supreme or above, as for whether it has reached the combat power of the god general, it is not very clear!"

Ye Tian naturally understood from Hammon's memory the division of the combat power of the Earth Venerable in the chaos, and the combat power of the Divine General was the level of combat power division beyond the first-class supreme.

It's just that Ye Tian has never seen a god general, so he can't judge.

But he felt that he had the potential to break into the core area of the Misty Zone, and even hope to obtain some precious and rare elixirs.

The elixirs in the inner area can make his strength skyrocket, and if he gets some elixirs in the core area, wouldn't it be a leap and bound.

For the sake of a quick increase in strength, it is worth taking a risk!

In the blink of an eye, another 6,000 years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Chaos Sea Mist Area again.

This time, he didn't look for the Mist Mercenary Group, and now he is more familiar with the Mist area than anyone else, so where do you need someone else to lead the way!

Outer area!

Interior area!

Ye Tian passed through in an instant, and soon came to the front of the core area.

Rumble!

Step into the core area, and the Life Heavenly Pupil unfolds.

At this moment, the misty beasts above the second rank and above woke up, and they came towards Ye Tian one by one to besiege him.

Ye Tian didn't rush over, in case of an unexpected situation, he could at least return to the inner area instantly, if he rushed in, once he was surrounded, it would be difficult to rush out again.

"Fight!"

Ye Tian roared loudly and cast the third form of the Hunyuan system, the Hunyuan Domain!

Buzz Buzz !!!

The extremely powerful Hunyuan Realm unfolded, suppressing a second-rank supreme misty beast.

Then, the third type of Heavenly Killing Knife of the Heavenly Sword Series slashed out, and countless sword lights tore through the body of a second-class supreme misty beast, killing them completely in an instant.

In the blink of an eye, more than fifty second-rank supreme misty beasts fell.

And at this time, the first-class supreme-level mist beast was dispatched!
